text.title: Technical Debt Trade-off Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes by Fowler quadrant + touch frequency + budget headroom to a rule in 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: was the better solution known when the shortcut was taken?

conclusion.verdict: classify as inadvertent learning, not debt; do not issue DEBT id
escalate to ATAM; refuse DEBT issue
document and accept; no repayment plan needed when interest never accrues
block new debt; repay an existing item first
emit DEBT record with both axes tagged + observable trigger

text.example: intent_known=true → module_count=1 (localized) → touches_per_quarter=2 → 14.2+0.6=14.8 ≤ 20 → conclusion fowler-quadrant-required → emit DEBT-0014.
